intake.user_request: Take the agent-facing bar from B+ to A+ by closing the verified capability gaps between CODEREF-CORE's MCP surface and best-in-class agent code-intelligence (Serena/Aider). Implement features we already have the infrastructure for but are not exposing, plus two heavier builds (graph-safe incremental watch, promote Go to a real call+import graph).

classification.plan_type_rationale: Six independent capability areas of escalating effort (pure MCP wiring → exposure → small additions → build-if-missing → heavy incremental → heavy language promotion). Per-phase hard stop lets the cheap high-value wiring wins (P1-P3) land and be reviewed before the heavier P5/P6 builds. Strict one-shot planning is wrong (too many independent surfaces); light is wrong (real engine changes with test obligations).
classification.discovery_ref: in-conversation read-only gap analysis 2026-07-03 (two Explore agents, file:line-grounded)

verification_provenance.method: Read-only investigation 2026-07-03. Full read of src/cli/coderef-mcp-server.ts (all 11 tools), src/pipeline/graph-builder.ts (EdgeEvidence union), plus two Explore-agent sweeps over call-resolver.ts, canonical-graph.ts, coderef-query.ts, relationship-extractor.ts, orchestrator.ts, coderef-watch.ts, incremental-cache.ts, eval/*.json, rag-eval.ts. Every gap carries file:line evidence.
verification_provenance.reality_anchor: 2411 elements / 257 files; graph 2771 nodes / 29123 edges; validation-report.json at close 4cd33af (2026-07-02).

premise_confirmed_by_validation_report.note: 18,837 non-resolved edges (5,348 unresolved + 1,155 ambiguous at source-call grain) are computed, persisted in graph.json with candidates[]/reason evidence, and counted — but NO agent-facing tool can enumerate them. This is the empirical backing for P2.

in_scope: P1: MCP outbound-traversal tools (what X calls/imports/depends-on) + path query (path A→B), wiring existing canonical-graph.ts functions.
P2: MCP tool to enumerate ambiguous/unresolved call+import edges with their persisted candidates[]/reason.
P3: source-body retrieval by codeRefId (file+line slice); unified find-all-references (union call+import, make typeOnly traversable); rich per-edge evidence passthrough in what_calls.
P4: build-if-missing in the MCP server (invoke orchestrator in-process when .coderef/ absent/stale) + source-mtime staleness detection.
P5: graph-safe incremental watch — persisted full symbol table + delta re-resolution of changed files only, wired into populate (not just scan).
P6: promote Go to a real call+import graph — walkRawGo{Imports,Calls,Exports} raw-fact emitters using the TS/JS emitters as template.
out_of_scope: ENGINE-RIGOR BAR (separate track, operator-deferred 2026-07-03): cross-repo / multi-package resolution; scored graph-correctness eval (golden-graph precision/recall/ambiguity-rate metric CLI). File as separate stub(s), do NOT fold in.
Promoting rust/java/cpp to the graph (P6 proves the pattern on Go only; the other three are follow-on once the template is validated).
Any cloud LLM/embedding provider wiring — Ollama local-only remains the only embedding path.
RAG retrieval quality / MRR improvements (the rag-eval baseline is stale but that is a retrieval concern, not an agent-native graph capability gap).

constraints: Ollama local-only: no cloud LLM/embedding API keys; do not present OpenAI/Anthropic as required defaults anywhere touched.
main-only git model: commit by EXPLICIT path, never git add -A. .coderef/ stays gitignored (operational, not committed).
No close-workorder bypass: no --force, SKIP_COMMIT_CONTENT_CHECK forbidden.

METHOD (feedback_scan_surfaces_not_verdicts): each phase's FIRST task READS its target files before authoring the fix. A gap surfaced by a count is a place to look, not a proven defect — the code decides whether and how big the fix is.

MCP additive-stability: existing 11 tools and their response shapes must not regress; new tools are additive. The server is typed against ExportedGraph so a schema drift is a compile error — keep it that way.

P5 correctness trap: naive incremental (filtering state.elements to changed files) blinds buildSymbolTable to unchanged cross-file targets and silently corrupts resolution. Do NOT enable the existing IncrementalCache on populate without the persisted-full-symbol-table fix.

hotspot_files.reason: entire agent-facing surface; P1-P4 all touch it
EdgeEvidence union (P2 source of truth) + edge emit sites
outbound + path functions P1 wires (already built)
